name: kinyarwanda-dataset-sources
description: Public Kinyarwanda data sources Gihanga can use as references or future import targets. Do not copy large copyrighted text into Gihanga; store citations, metadata, and small curated terms only.

sources.name: mbazaNLP Kinyarwanda Monolingual Dataset v01.x
sources.size_note: About 78k documents and about 25 million words in v01.0; dataset card recommends using v01.1 when available.
sources.license_note: CC BY 4.0 with copyright retained by original text authors; use for data processing/statistical analysis, not republishing large text chunks.
sources.recommended_use: Train/evaluate language understanding, extract frequency statistics, curate short glossary candidates with attribution.

sources.name: mbazaNLP Kinyarwanda-English parallel dataset
sources.license_note: CC BY 4.0; religious/web-scraped content, not fully curated.
sources.recommended_use: Translation model experiments and terminology alignment; review before using community-facing text.

sources.name: Digital Umuganda Kinyarwanda-English machine translation dataset
sources.size_note: Kinyarwanda-English TSV corpus on Hugging Face.

sources.name: Leipzig Corpora Collection Kinyarwanda Wikipedia 2021
sources.license_note: Wikipedia-derived; cite Leipzig Corpora Collection and Wikipedia.
sources.recommended_use: Small clean reference corpus and word co-occurrence/frequency examples.

sources.name: KINNEWS and KIRNEWS Corpus
sources.size_note: KINNEWS has about 21,268 Kinyarwanda news articles with 14 classes.
sources.license_note: Repository is MIT; cite the COLING 2020 paper. Verify raw data download terms before redistribution.

sources.name: Mozilla Common Voice Kinyarwanda / Digital Umuganda references
sources.size_note: Kinyarwanda speech/text prompts; Digital Umuganda repo references 1.2M+ sentences via Common Voice releases.
sources.license_note: Common Voice data uses Mozilla dataset license terms; check release license before bundling.
sources.recommended_use: Speech, pronunciation, and short sentence examples.

sources.name: hunspell-rw
sources.license_note: Check repository license before bundling derived data.
